narrative:
Cols 82-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 478 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.0 percentage points.
